core_rule: A meaningful directory should not be silent.
absorbed_from: the previously-planned Directory Configuration Ledger (renamed and merged 2026-04-29 per Jake — single concept under a cleaner name)

criteria_any_one_of: contains generated files agents might accidentally edit
has multiple important subfolders sharing local context
has local open problems or audit history

box_classes.description: Anything not yet classed (require a note explaining why)

box_status_labels.label: mixed
box_status_labels.meaning: contains both source and generated files

box_status_labels.label: legacy
box_status_labels.meaning: old but may still contain useful references

box_status_labels.label: archive
box_status_labels.meaning: historical; do not use as current truth

box_status_labels.label: sensitive
box_status_labels.meaning: contains credentials, private data, or risky client info

required_sections: What This Box Does Not Own
standard_box_md.required_footer: Update Rules For This Box Ledger

orientation_file_options.when: directory is a full Box per Section 2
directory is meaningful but doesn't yet warrant a full Box
directory is generated, ignored, or trivially obvious

DIRECTORY_md_to_BOX_md_when: develops a local Done Gate beyond the global one
more than one project-level ledger applies locally

non_orientation_local_files.purpose: local content owned by the Box

orchestrator.conflict_rule: Fix the source data or generator first, then regenerate. Do not hand-edit generated state.

universal_checks: correct local source was changed (not generated output)
generated files were not edited as if source
relevant project-level ledgers were updated (per DEC-2026-04-29-003)
local Recent Changes section is updated
local Open Local Problems is updated if a problem was found

client: If strategy or state changed, audit marker (YYYY-MM-DD_audit_marker.md) was created or updated
If a plan was edited, 'Audit-cleaned: <date>' line is on the plan file
If a reply was received, plan was reviewed for staleness (per DEC-2026-04-28-004)
app-ui: page_asset_sitemap.md was updated in the same unit of work (per DEC-2026-04-28-007)
ledger: TCL Section 1 / Section 3 was updated if structural change occurred (per DEC-2026-04-29-003)
Global Ledger Section 12 was updated if major move
Index updated if a new ledger row landed
subagent-package: If graduating to runnable form, both /Subagent Boxes/<name>/ and CCAgentindex/agents/<name>/ are in sync

local_agent_protocol: Read linked project-level ledgers if relevant (Global, Temporal Continuity, Decisions).
Read the local source-of-truth files in trust order.
Identify whether the target file is source or generated.
Check local guardrails and forbidden actions.
Verify the change (run a check, view output, read diff) — or explain why verification was not possible.
Update local memory (Recent Local Changes, Open Local Problems).
Update project-level ledgers if the change affects global understanding.
Append to activity.jsonl for non-trivial changes.
Leave a handoff note if the next agent needs context.

third_wave: Per-client BOX.md only for high-value or complex clients
Brenda & Steve and Hugo Casillas qualify

lifecycle_rules.created: stamp landed; required sections present; minimal content
lifecycle_rules.active: in regular use; content matches reality
lifecycle_rules.audited: latest pass confirmed accuracy; audit timestamp on the BOX.md or in a dated marker
lifecycle_rules.retired: directory no longer used; BOX.md kept with Status: retired YYYY-MM-DD and a final note. Not deleted — preserves rebuild instructions.

common_mistakes: Treating a folder as a Box without need
Treating a local exception as a global rule
Editing generated output instead of the generator
Making agents infer source-of-truth from scattered files
Overloading the Global Ledger with details that belong in a local Box
Creating local rules that contradict the Global Ledger
Forgetting that directories can contain sensitive data

triad_spine.role: this ledger operationalizes the Box leg

other_legs.Ledger leg: project-level ledgers under LEDGERS/ + per-Box ledgers (sections inside each BOX.md)
other_legs.Sub-agent leg: /Subagent Boxes/ (draft) -> CCAgentindex/agents/ (runnable, Phase B) -> Subagent Boxes (Phase C)

file_directory_ledger.separation: FDL maps what directories exist; Box Ledger defines which ones should have a BOX.md and what it must contain

operationalizes.via: the 28 Client Boxes' BOX.md files enforce the trust order
Auto/Client Boxes/ Box owns canonical truth; UI Box only displays
app-ui Box class extends its Local Done Gate to require sitemap updates
this entire ledger is the operational form of that decision
Local Agent Protocol enforces it at the Box level

communications_ledger.local_equivalent: each Box's Recent Local Changes and Next Handoff Notes
communications_ledger.promotion_threshold: local-context messages stay in the Box; project-wide messages get promoted to Communications

open_problems_ledger.mirroring: local-only problems stay local; project-wide problems get a PROB- ID and live in both places (with the Box pointing to the global PROB)

source_of_truth_ledger_planned.relationship: each Box's Section 4 (Source-of-Truth Inside This Box) is the local implementation of those project-wide rules

definition_of_done_ledger_planned.relationship: each Box's Section 11 (Local Done Gate) is the per-Box specialization of those standards

visuals.name: box_orientation_flow
visuals.purpose: Agent enters directory -> reads BOX.md -> identifies truth -> checks rules -> edits -> applies Local Done Gate

visuals.name: box_hierarchy
visuals.purpose: Global Ledger -> File Directory Ledger -> Box Ledger -> per-class BOX.md instances
